Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has registered and provided correct credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User has registered and provided incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Enter "wrongpassword" as the password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect password.

Title: Empty Username
Preconditions: User has registered and left the username field empty.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the username field empty.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the need to enter a username.

Title: Successful Sign Up
Test Steps:
1. Enter "newuser" as the username.
2. Enter "newpassword" as the password.
3. Enter "newuser@example.com" as the email.
4. Click the sign up button.
Expected Result: User is signed up successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Duplicate Username
Preconditions: User has already registered with the same username.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "existinguser" as the username.
2. Enter "existingpassword" as the password.
3. Enter "existinguser@example.com" as the email.
4. Click the sign up button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the username is already taken.

Title: Successful Geolocation
Test Steps:
1. Enter "45.4642" as the latitude.
2. Enter "9.1900" as the longitude.
3. Click the geolocate button.
Expected Result: User's location is geolocated successfully.

Title: Successful Creation of Announcement
Test Data: title = "Test Announcement", description = "This is a test announcement.", price = 10.00
Test Steps:
1. Enter "Test Announcement" as the title.
2. Enter "This is a test announcement." as the description.
3. Enter "10.00" as the price.
4. Click the create announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is created successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Successful Booking of Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Enter "1" as the announcementId.
2. Click the book announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is booked successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Successful Filtering of Announcements
Test Steps:
1. Enter "Electronics" as the category.
2. Click the filter announcements button.
Expected Result: Announcements are filtered successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Successful Acceptance of Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Enter "1" as the announcementId.
2. Click the accept announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is accepted successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Successful Viewing of Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Enter "1" as the announcementId.
2. Click the view announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is viewed successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Successful Modification of Announcement
Test Data: announcementId = 1, title = "Updated Title", description = "Updated description.", price = 20.00
Test Steps:
1. Enter "1" as the announcementId.
2. Enter "Updated Title" as the title.
3. Enter "Updated description." as the description.
4. Enter "20.00" as the price.
5. Click the modify announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is modified successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Successful Deletion of Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Enter "1" as the announcementId.
2. Click the delete announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is deleted successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Successful Modification of Account

3. Enter "updateduser@example.com" as the email.
4. Click the modify account button.

4. Click the create user button.

Title: Notification of Existing User
Preconditions: User has tried to create a user with an existing username.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "existinguser" as the username.
2. Enter "newpassword" as the password.
3. Enter "existinguser@example.com" as the email.
4. Click the create user button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the username already exists.

Title: Notification of Existing Noticeboard
Preconditions: User has tried to create a noticeboard with an existing title.
Test Data: title = "Existing Noticeboard", description = "This is an existing noticeboard."
Test Steps:
1. Enter "Existing Noticeboard" as the title.
2. Enter "This is an existing noticeboard." as the description.
3. Click the create noticeboard button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the noticeboard title already exists.

Title: Check Candidate List

Expected Result: Candidate list is checked successfully and redirected to the main menu.
